title: Fullbright UB
description: Experience Fullbright UB in Sodium, Optifine and Vanilla
body:
![Banner](https://worldresourcepack.com/pingo/files/rp/fullbright/banner/fullbright-26.1-b.jpg)
**Fullbright UB Resource Pack**
Brings light into the darkness - without torches! This resource pack ensures maximum brightness in Minecraft and is compatible with **Vanilla**, [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) (with [PolyTone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone)) and [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads).
*Features:*
  • Full brightness: Always see everything clearly - even in caves and at night.
  • Compatible & performant: Runs smoothly with Vanilla, Optifine and Sodium (with PolyTone).
  • Simple installation: Drag the file into the resource pack directory and activate it in the game - done.
**Conclusion:** Ideal for anyone who wants to experience Minecraft in a brighter and clearer way - without any mods or shaders. Sodium version 1.21.6 requires a small additional mod like Polytone. You can simply drag this into the resource pack folder, after which everything should work.
**⚠️ Need Help? Refer to the Document!** [Docs / FAQ](https://blog.worldresourcepack.com/blog/fullbright-faq)
If you require assistance with installing or using the Fullbright resource pack, feel free to consult this document. Here, you'll find step-by-step instructions for installation as well as tips and tricks for maximizing the use of the resource pack. Should further questions arise, don't hesitate to reach out to our community or [support team](https://worldresourcepack.com/support/contact-support). We're here to assist you and ensure you get the most out of your Minecraft experience.
